query:
UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CASE 
  WHEN id = 1 THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030391939/TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM/IMG-20250915-WA0027_c98b1a88.jpg'
  WHEN id = 2 THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030391939/TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM/20250503_165049_c59bbe61.jpg'

command:

  WHEN id = 1 THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030391939/TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM/IMG-20250915-WA0027_c98b1a88.jpg'
